image.description: The source image to inpaint. Must be a valid image file.

mask.description: A mask image indicating the region to inpaint. White pixels indicate areas to fill, black pixels indicate areas to preserve.

prompt.description: Text describing what should appear in the masked region.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the inpainted region.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation.

output_format.description: The output format of the edited image.
